summary: Tested 3 UI fixes: 1) Country dropdown with Balkan countries + manual entry 2) Mobile language dropdown 3-column grid 3) StaffPOS login with Mitarbeiternummer. All features working correctly.

minor.issue: Fixed: Staff login was not checking enterprise_accounts collection for partner lookup

integration_issues.issue: Fixed: Frontend was calling /api/partner/staff/login instead of /api/partner-portal/staff/login

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Country dropdown includes all Balkan countries: XK Kosovo, AL Albanien, MK Nordmazedonien, RS Serbien, BA Bosnien, HR Kroatien (AdminEnterpriseManagement.js lines 507-512)
✓ 'Manuell eingeben...' option (OTHER) shows text input for custom country code (lines 470-487)
✓ Mobile language dropdown uses 3-column grid (grid-cols-3) with vertical layout (flex-col) - flags on top, text below (StaffPOS.js lines 2376-2394)
✓ StaffPOS login shows 'Mitarbeiternummer' label instead of 'E-Mail' (line 2273)
✓ StaffPOS login input has placeholder 'z.B. MA-001234' (line 2278)
✓ handleLogin tries /api/partner-portal/staff/login first, then falls back to enterprise login (lines 1809-1870)
✓ Backend staff login endpoint supports staff_number authentication (partner_portal.py lines 416-491)
updated_files: /app/backend/routers/partner_portal.py - Added enterprise_accounts lookup in staff login

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI features verified via Playwright
